description:
🕒 08:00–15:10

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Eco-Tourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/ohk-hannoalps4/

We traverse the spine of the Hanno Alps—the ridge running from Izu-gatake to Tenran Mountain—over four separate hikes. Part 4 starts at Higashi-Asano Station and crosses Tengaku Mountain, Kusumi Pass, and Nagata Mountain before reaching Takubu-su Mountain, Tenran Mountain, and finishing at Hanno Station. Lunch will be a special boxed meal from Nikoniko House.

【Fee】 ¥7,800 per person (includes guide, lunch, and insurance)

【Capacity】 10 people

【Guide】 Akira Shimizu (certified by the Japan Alpine Guide Association, Mountain Guide Stage II)

【What to bring】 Gloves, drinking water, hat, rain gear, trail snacks (candy/crackers), towel
location: 集合 西武池袋線「東吾野駅」駅前広場
summary: Guided hike: Hanno Alps Full Traverse Part 4 (Higashi-Asano Station to Tengaku Mountain, Takubu-su Mountain, Tenran Mountain, and Hanno Station)
